summary: v1 -> v2 update: 16 total changes. Business Info: 1 change(s); Hours And Schedule: 3 change(s); Services: 1 change(s); Emergency Config: 3 change(s); Transfer Config: 2 change(s); Other: 6 change(s)

business_info.new_value: 1200 Peachtree Industrial Boulevard, Suite 450, Atlanta, Georgia 30309

emergency_config.old_value: Take a detailed message and assure callback within the hour

emergency_config.new_value: Collect caller details and confirm follow-up during business hours

transfer_config.old_value: I apologize, I'm unable to transfer you right now. Let me take your information and make sure someone gets back to you promptly.
transfer_config.new_value: I wasn't able to reach the on-call technician directly. I'll dispatch your request and someone will contact you as soon as possible.

other.old_value: Caller reaches Clara after business hours. Clara greets the caller and acknowledges after-hours status. Clara asks for the purpose of the call. Clara determines if this is an emergency. If EMERGENCY: Clara immediately collects name, callback number, and location/address. Clara attempts to transfer to on-call personnel (receptionist). If transfer fails, Clara assures the caller that someone will call back shortly. If NOT EMERGENCY: Clara collects details and confirms follow-up during next business day. Clara asks if there's anything else needed. Clara closes the call.

Clara closes the call professionally.
